topic: In China employee termination: Pulse-style legal-and-operations brief for foreign employers
primary_keyword: China employee termination foreign employer brief

sources.title: Labor Contract Law of the People's Republic of China
sources.fit_note: Core rules for lawful termination routes, notice, economic compensation, and invalid-termination exposure.

sources.title: Regulations for the Implementation of the Labor Contract Law of the PRC (State Council Decree No. 535)
sources.fit_note: Operational interpretation layer for employer-side execution and documentation.

sources.title: Interpretation of the Supreme People's Court on Issues Concerning the Application of Law in the Trial of Labor Dispute Cases (I)
sources.fit_note: Dispute-facing lens for evidence sufficiency and consistency in litigation/arbitration pathways.

sources.title: Law of the PRC on Mediation and Arbitration of Labor Disputes
sources.fit_note: Anchors filing limitation and arbitration timeline for risk-speed framing.

sources.title: Social Insurance Law of the People's Republic of China
sources.fit_note: Supports statutory closure obligations during termination-month offboarding.

sources.title: Employee Termination in China: A Guide for Employers
sources.fit_note: Practical translation for non-China leadership teams; used as secondary interpretation, not primary legal anchor.

source_replacement_notes: Replaced weaker generic blog-style commentary with statute/judicial sources and a single practitioner translation layer.
Added labor-dispute procedure source to support time-bound risk anchors (1-year filing, 45+15 arbitration window).
Kept legal hierarchy explicit: law -> regulation -> judicial interpretation -> practice guide.
